pattern: Many overlapping range updates collapse into a single difference array, so one prefix-sum pass yields each character's net shift modulo the alphabet size.
hints: Applying every range shift directly is wasteful; only the net shift per index matters.
Represent each [start, end, dir] as +1 or -1 at start and the cancelling value just past end, then accumulate.
Build a difference array of length n+1, add the signed delta at start and subtract it at end+1, take the running prefix sum, and rotate each letter by that sum modulo 26.

edge_inputs.description: only part of the string is touched

stress.description: long string with many random overlapping ranges
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz') for _ in range(n))
    m = max(1, size)
    shifts = []
    for _ in range(m):
        a = rng.randrange(0, n)
        b = rng.randrange(a, n)
        d = rng.randrange(0, 2)
        shifts.append([a, b, d])
    return [s, shifts]
